theme: bicycle courier pelotons sharing slipstreams across a city
title: Slipstream Couriers: Convoy Formation and Lead Rotation
innovation_hook: Energy-optimal solutions deliberately DETOUR to merge into shared corridors and rotate the lead position; the real problem is convoy formation and leadership scheduling, not routing.
strategies: trivial: independent shortest path per courier, ride ASAP, everyone solo -- reproduces the checker baseline (~0.1); staggered spur delays mean no two couriers ever share an edge on the same tick, so no drafting happens

greedy: discover the shared corridor, wait/detour to synchronize into a convoy so followers draft, but keep ONE fixed leader the whole way -- the obvious convoy idea that ignores the growing lead-streak penalty

strong: same synchronized convoy, but ROTATE the lead every edge so no courier accumulates a streak; rotation is what makes a convoy cheaper than riding solo, and is scheduled per-edge over the changing convoy membership
beyond: jointly optimize which couriers to merge (given deadline slack), where to detour, and a lead-rotation schedule that also balances partial-overlap couriers entering and leaving the corridor
